channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Go North launches July 28 for Xbox Series and PC, later for Switch
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

Atmospheric maze adventure game dated.

Atmospheric maze adventure game Go North will launch for Xbox Series and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on July 28, followed by Switch at a later date, developer gazuntype announced. A demo is available now for PC.

“There is a certain sense of serenity that comes from a good walk,” said gazuntype solo developer Tade Ajiboye in a press release. “With so much uncertainty in the real world, I wanted the calmness Go North exudes to be embedded into the core gameplay loop. As finding the exit due north is the only duty Dara has, I hope players feel the freedom to take their time, look around, and sit in the stillness of patience without penalties to find peace of mind. Today’s demo provides a glimpse, but the full launch has some magical surprises left in store.”

Here is an overview of the game, via gazuntype:

Direct Dara through twisted thickets of forests, bookshelf corridors, sky islands and more in four brand new levels debuting with today’s demo alongside never before seen puzzles and sidequests, including the newly introduced Camera mechanic. Glimpse into the magic of the full game’s world with an all-new opening cinematic and prepare to meet the Maze God face to face… if you can find him.

Discover the Maze God’s whereabouts by finding the exit to a series of immersive labyrinths designed by one-man developer Tade Ajiboye, highlighting West Africa’s award-winning contributions to interactive media worldwide. Through tranquil representations of being lost, feeling adrift, and lacking direction, Go North provides players a chance to tackle calm calamities and reconnect with a slower pace of life.

Find ancient relics weaving magic with technology, like the moth-shaped Lunaboard or levitating bubble to get a bird’s eye view, to help Dara navigate through each world. Locate secret Golden Compasses to find unlockables, and customize Dara with cosmetics like hats, scarves, and more to personalize every journey in meaningfully quaint ways.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/go-north-launches-july-28-for-xbox-series-and-pc-later-for-switch
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Truck-kun is Supporting Me From Another World?! launches July 29
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox Series

Absurdist anime driving game dated.

Truck-kun is Supporting Me From Another World?!, a vehicular action game where you play as a truck that “isekais” people into another world, will launch for Xbox Series and PC via Steam on July 29, publisher Frosty Pop and developer Strange Scaffold announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Strange Scaffold:

About

Truck-kun is Supporting Me From Another World?! is a vehicular action game where you play as a truck that isekais people into another world.

This anime-inspired title is about smashing through objects at high speed to power up the corporate ladder climber you accidentally isekai’d into a dangerous medieval fantasy world. Inspired by the anime and manga subgenre of Isekai, in which characters find themselves in parallel universes, Truck-kun is Supporting Me From Another World?! revels in absurdism while simultaneously grounding itself with sharp satire that reflects real life.

Players start their journey with Carissa Ward, who is about to start a new job as VP of marketing in the sunny coastal town of Wenvale. That plan is cut short when she’s struck by a delivery truck and awakens in the fantasy world of Talinfold. To get home, she must unlock the Galactic Gate, defeat the Skeleton King, and claim his Scroll of Resurrection—with your help.

Good luck!!!

Key Features

  • Dodge cops, make deliveries, and smash through objects in the chaotic small town of Wenvale, USA!
  • Complete objectives across two worlds to power up a Galactic Gate with stars and unlock a subversive, heartwarming story rooted in our love for anime.
  • Run over pedestrians to turn them into monsters Carissa can slay for stars and XP. It’s fine! Don’t worry! Stop thinking about it!!
  • Energetic, ska-inspired soundtrack by award-winning composer David Mason (DREDGE, Creepy Redneck Dinosaur Mansion 3).
  • A giant, screaming man whose meat you can legally drive through.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/truck-kun-is-supporting-me-from-another-world-launches-july-29
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Moonana announces ‘vampire Soulsvania’ game Bathory: Heritage of Blood for Switch, PC
item.content:encoded:
Keylocker: Turn Based Cyberpunk Action developer Moonana has announced Bathory: Heritage of Blood, a “vampire Soulsvania” game inspired by “Castlevania, Nosferatu, and gothic Victorian literature classics.” It will launch for Switch and PC via Steam in 2027.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Play as Ursula Bathory, the vampire Princess, awakened from a centuries long slumber to claim her throne of blood in this Vampire Soulsvania inspired by Castlevania, Nosferatu, and gothic Victorian literature classics.

Story

Next in line to the Throne of Blood, Ursula Bathory has been poisoned and locked in a coffin for decades by her own mother, Queen Regent Elizabeth Bathory. Now awakened from her slumber, she seeks revenge and to reclaim her rightful place as Queen of Vampires.

Key Features

  • Play as vampire princess Ursula Bathory, fighting a war of succession against her mother, Elizabeth Bathory.
  • Conquer the domain of Elizabeth Bathory, defeat her servants and assert your place as Vampire Queen within the inhuman halls of Čachtice Castle. Explore ghostly libraries, royal galleries, be embraced by the world inside paintings and uncover the past that connects Vampires and Humans.
  • Attack using your own Life, creating an intense combat experience where you’re constantly calculating when to Attack or Defend. Enemies spill Blood when struck, so claim their Blood to regenerate your own and find an edge in combat, as Vampire Princess.
  • Each Attack can be refined through various magics of Blood, Fire and Bone. Choose your Artifacts carefully and customize your arsenal of attacks in order to defeat the many foes that await you within Elizabeth Bathory’s Castle.
  • Steal the Spells of your foes and Transform into Great Vampiric Beasts as you grow your power as a contender for the Throne of Blood.
  • Uncover the secrets of the Vampire underworld society and the Church conspiracy

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/moonana-announces-vampire-soulsvania-game-bathory-heritage-of-blood-for-switch-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
